title: 天皇賞（春）の後に・揃って、何度でも

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide dominates the race with a
stunning performance and finishes ahead of
Narita Taishin.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Genuinely recognizing her strength, Narita
Taishin puts Biwa Hayahide in even greater
spirits.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket is envious of the fun race that
Narita Taishin and Biwa Hayahide shared...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But the Twinkle Series is not over yet, and they'll
have as many chances as they want to race
together again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The BNW trio promises to once again face off at
the autumn Tenno Sho.
